# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BUILD_COMMAND', defaultValue: 'echo "No build command specified."', description: 'Enter your build command')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: 'echo "No test script specified."', description: 'Enter your test script command')
        string(name: 'DEPLOY_STEP', defaultValue: 'echo "No deployment step specified."', description: 'Enter your deployment command')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Build Command"
                    sh "${params.BUILD_COMMAND}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Test') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Test Script"
                    sh "${params.TEST_SCRIPT}"
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            steps {
                script {
                    echo "Executing Deployment Step"
                    sh "${params.DEPLOY_STEP}"
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
